name: Create catalog item

targetRestContract.notes: Duplicate name check runs before insert; throws DuplicateException caught by ExceptionMiddleware → HTTP 409 Conflict. Image upload fields in the request are accepted but ignored — PictureUri is always set to the default placeholder after insert. Returns HTTP 201 Created with Location header.

notes: Image upload is disabled — PictureUri, PictureBase64, and PictureName in the request body are ignored. After insert, UpdatePictureUri("eCatalog-item-default.png") overwrites PictureUri and a second UpdateAsync is called. The Java target can collapse this into a single INSERT by setting the default before persisting.
DuplicateException (name collision) is caught by ExceptionMiddleware and returned as HTTP 409 Conflict with JSON body { statusCode: 409, message: '...' }.
No AutoMapper — CatalogItemDto is manually constructed field-by-field inside HandleAsync.
Requires JWT Bearer token with ADMINISTRATORS role (BlazorShared.Authorization.Constants.Roles.ADMINISTRATORS = 'Administrators').
